creator: mik@bms.sgg.ru
text:
ATAPI CD-Rom not found, though working properly in Windows95

Fix: 

Configure CD-ROM as master device.
Optional - include this information in short install information.
How-To-Repeat: Attach CDRom to secondary IDE controller as slave, without any master 
on the same controller.
For example, there was master hard disk connected with CDROM to secondary EIDE controller, and you remove hard disk.
